title: Improved Genuine Transformer System Report (v2)

summary.training: Balanced synthetic reasoning vs local induction

findings: Model architecture scaled up to improve capacity for complex patterns.
Training dataset enhanced to include both narrative dependency and local pattern completion tasks.
Mechanistic interpretability probes verified on local model state.
Benchmark infrastructure stabilized with dependency resolution and SDK mocking.
recommendations: Scale up to GPU-based training for higher sample count evaluation.
Further refine the adaptive threshold in the regularization function.
Expand the prompt library for the precision targeting engine to include more diverse reasoning types.
